Get 99 Def :CHECK:  and Magic :CHECK:
Work through my stack of 50+ elite caskets and do all the master clues from those
Get a non-combat 99 (mining probably)
Continue Slayer, ideally getting to 93 and getting Occult
Get to Elite CAs
Get Rangers
Learn all GWD bosses and get drops from there, particularly Bandos
Continue raiding (ToA mainly) with friends
Get voidwaker
